name: Mother's Mince Meat Bars (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 7x11x2 inch baking pan.
3. Combine the crust ingredients: flour, salt, pecans, quick oats, brown sugar, and melted margarine. Mix well.
4. Press half of the mixture into the prepared baking pan.
5. Prepare the filling by simmering the mincemeat, sugar, corn starch, and lemon juice until thickened. Allow to cool.
6. Spread the cooled filling over the dough in the pan.
7. Cover with the remaining crust mixture. Pat down well to ensure an even layer.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-35 minutes, or until set.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely in the pan.
10. Cut into squares.
11. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper.
